What We Host

Every Occasion, One Address

From the haldi ceremony to the reception dance floor, Diamond Banquet Hall is equipped for every function on your calendar.

Grand hall styled for the main ceremony and evening reception.

About Diamond Banquet Hall

A Premium Venue, Built for Big Celebrations

Located on Khadi Machine Road in Tetavli, Kausa, Diamond Banquet Hall has spent years hosting Mumbra's weddings and family functions with a hands-on team and a hall built for scale — without losing the personal touch.

  • Spacious, air-conditioned hall
  • Affordable, transparent packages
  • Experienced on-site event team
  • Family-friendly, accessible venue
  • In-house decor & catering
  • Trusted by 1700+ customers

Questions

Frequently Asked

How far in advance should I book the hall?

We recommend booking 2–3 months ahead for wedding season dates, though we can often accommodate shorter notice for weekday functions.

Do you provide catering, or can we bring our own?

In-house catering is included in every package. Outside catering can be discussed for select bookings — ask our team when you call.

Is parking available for guests?

Yes, we offer free on-site parking with valet assistance for larger events such as Diamond and Royal Platinum bookings.

Can packages be customised?

Absolutely — every package is a starting point. Decor themes, menu items and guest capacity can be adjusted to your budget.

What is the advance payment to confirm a date?

A booking advance secures your date; the remaining balance is due closer to the event. Our team will confirm exact terms when you enquire.
